title: Vortex ingest prepare-once local smoke
audience: user who wants to create a local VortexPreparedState from an admitted local source
claim_boundary: Feature-gated local prepare-once fixture smoke over flat non-null scalar rows, including non-null binary byte payloads. ingest_minimal records artifact/digest/writer evidence, ingest_certified reopens/scans row-count proof, and ingest_full_replay blocks until downstream replay exists. Scout ingress, layout/write advisor, copy-budget, append-only differential refinement, and capillary evidence stay inside vortex_ingest. Automatic append-only refinement is limited to local CSV/JSONL prefix-verified appends, writes only a delta Vortex artifact, leaves the base unchanged, and admits count-family consumer evidence only. Nullable/all-null binary rows and other NULL-bearing Vortex output batches block before writer conversion; malformed sources, unsupported strategies, unsafe lifetime shortcuts, non-append drift, missing manifests, changed compression/format posture, and update/delete/upsert/schema mismatch block before claims. Python session reuse is local and fingerprint-gated. No broad Vortex writer, object-store/table sink, CDC/table transaction, production SQL/DataFrame, persistent/distributed cache, performance, superiority, Foundry, package-publication, or Spark-replacement claim.
runnable_example: New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force target | Out-Null; "id,label,amount`n1,alpha,8`n2,beta,15`n" | Set-Content -Encoding utf8 target\vortex-ingest-source.csv; cargo run -q -p shardloom-cli --features vortex-write -- vortex-ingest-smoke target\vortex-ingest-source.csv target\vortex-ingest-source.vortex --allow-overwrite --format json; $env:PYTHONPATH = "python\src"; python -c "from shardloom import context; ctx=context(repo_root='.', profile_order=('debug','release')); r=ctx.prepare_vortex('target/vortex-ingest-source.csv','target/vortex-ingest-source.vortex', allow_overwrite=True); print(r.vortex_ingest_status, r.prepared_state_created, r.input_row_count, r.fallback_attempted, r.external_engine_invoked)"
expected_output_evidence: A local .vortex artifact plus VortexPreparedState id/digest, certification-level/status fields, writer evidence, optional reopen row-count proof for ingest_certified, source-state fields, in-route scout-ingress/layout-write/copy-budget/differential/capillary/PulseWeave cold-preparation evidence, optional Python session reuse evidence, optional session-cache-smoke lifecycle evidence, and no-fallback/no-external-engine evidence.
